sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56594" key="kenofrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κενο-φροσύνη</orth> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κενό-φρων</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κενεοφρ</itype>-.</entryFree>
